## Proposed change

<!-- Describe your change and the problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Dependency upgrade
- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix/feature causing existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Code quality / refactor
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is tested locally in Home Assistant
- [ ] `node --check vertical-stack-in-card.js` passes
- [ ] `hacs.json` is still valid (`jq empty hacs.json`)
- [ ] A [Conventional Commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) message is used (feeds release-please + CHANGELOG)
